name: Spicced Gyngerbrede
recipeIngredient: 1/4 c Brandy (or fruit juice or coffee)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream shortening and orange rind together until smooth.
3. Gradually add brown sugar, beating thoroughly to make a smooth batter.
4. Blend in well beaten eggs (3).
5. Sift flour, soda, salt, cinnamon, mace, and nutmeg together.
6. Alternately mix the sifted dry ingredients with molasses and orange juice/brandy into the creamed mixture.
7. Fold in raisins.
8. Pour batter into a greased and floured 8" x 12" x 2-1/2" pan.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes clean.
